title: Enphase Energy Introduces US-Made Solar Solutions with Expanded Tax Credits
text: Enphase Energy introduced U.S.-made solar solutions qualifying for up to 50% in combined federal tax credits. When residential and commercial customers paired Enphase U.S.-made microinverters with U.S.-made solar racking and fasteners, projects qualified for Domestic Content Bonus tax credits offering 10% additional credit on top of existing 30% Inflation Reduction Act credits. Low-income community bonus provided extra 10% credit enabling total potential tax credits reaching 50% for qualified installations. Enphase accelerated domestic manufacturing capabilities positioning company to capitalize on expanded tax credit opportunities. Initiative addressed growing demand for U.S.-manufactured renewable energy equipment and supported domestic supply chain development.
